SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain

Class RealTimeOptimizationLoop.CycleRecord

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain.RealTimeOptimizationLoop.CycleRecord
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
RealTimeOptimizationLoop
public static class RealTimeOptimizationLoop.CycleRecord extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable record of one executed RTO cycle.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final int
    cycle
    1-based cycle index.
    private final double[]
    measurements
    Measurements read at the start of the cycle (may be empty).
    private final double
    objective
    Achieved objective after applying setpoints (NaN if not probed).
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization version identifier.
    private final double[]
    setpoints
    Setpoints applied during the cycle.

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      Serialization version identifier.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • cycle

      private final int cycle
      1-based cycle index.

    • measurements

      private final double[] measurements
      Measurements read at the start of the cycle (may be empty).

    • setpoints

      private final double[] setpoints
      Setpoints applied during the cycle.

    • objective

      private final double objective
      Achieved objective after applying setpoints (NaN if not probed).

  • Constructor Details

    • CycleRecord

      public CycleRecord(int cycle, double[] measurements, double[] setpoints, double objective)
      Creates a cycle record.
      Parameters:
      cycle - the 1-based cycle index
      measurements - the measurements read at the start of the cycle
      setpoints - the setpoints applied during the cycle
      objective - the achieved objective (NaN if not probed)

  • Method Details

    • getCycle

      public int getCycle()
      Gets the 1-based cycle index.
      Returns:
      the cycle index

    • getMeasurements

      public double[] getMeasurements()
      Gets the measurements read at the start of the cycle.
      Returns:
      a copy of the measurement vector

    • getSetpoints

      public double[] getSetpoints()
      Gets the setpoints applied during the cycle.
      Returns:
      a copy of the setpoint vector

    • getObjective

      public double getObjective()
      Gets the achieved objective after applying setpoints.
      Returns:
      the objective value, or NaN if not probed
